pricing: ynETHx vault convertToAssets(1e18) multiplied by SCALE_FACTOR (1e18); all four Chainlink feed slots and the quote vault are zero, so price reduces to vault's internal ETH-per-share conversion with no external oracle verification.
notes: Purely vault-based ERC4626 pricing — none of the four Chainlink feed slots are populated. ynETHx is a TransparentUpgradeableProxy (admin at 0xa02a8d), so convertToAssets logic can be changed by YieldNest. No circuit breaker or secondary price source. MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 itself is non-upgradeable.
